# Drovyu Preview CLI reference

Drovyu Preview CLI is a command-line tool for sharing static website builds as encrypted preview URLs. Its executable command is `dvyu`.

## Purpose

The product is intended for reviewing static HTML output from tools such as Astro, Vite, Storybook, and other static-site build systems. It is not a production hosting platform and does not execute server-side application code.

## Typical workflow

1. Run `dvyu preview` in a supported project or pass an HTML file or build directory.
2. If a supported project needs building, the CLI runs its configured build command.
3. Preview files are prepared and encrypted on the local device.
4. Only encrypted payloads are uploaded.
5. The CLI returns a preview URL whose fragment contains the decryption key.
6. A visitor's browser downloads and decrypts the preview after opening the full URL.

## Security model

- Encryption happens before upload on the user's device.
- The decryption key appears after `#` in the URL and is not included in normal HTTP requests to the server.
- The browser performs decryption when viewing a preview.
- Anyone who receives the complete preview URL can view that preview, so the URL must be treated as a secret.
- The public source repository can be audited to verify the client-side encryption flow.

## Commands

- `dvyu preview [path]`: Create a preview from an explicit file or directory, or detect a suitable build output from the current project.
- `dvyu update [path]`: Recreate a recorded preview while retaining its URL.
- `dvyu list`: List locally recorded, non-expired previews.
- `dvyu list all` or `dvyu list -a`: Include expired local records.
- `dvyu supporter`: Display or manage supporter status.
- `dvyu supporter link <email>`: Request an email verification link for supporter recovery.
- `dvyu lang`: Select Japanese or English output.
- `dvyu help`: Display command and option help.

## Sources

- Product: https://cli.drovyu.com/
- Documentation: https://cli.drovyu.com/docs/
- Help: https://cli.drovyu.com/help/
- Contact: https://cli.drovyu.com/contact/
- Privacy Policy: https://cli.drovyu.com/privacy/
- Terms of Service: https://cli.drovyu.com/terms/
- Source: https://github.com/Drovyu/preview-cli
- X: https://x.com/drovyu
- Discord: https://discord.gg/4SGxzSbaaD

For exact current behavior, options, limits, retention periods, and supporter benefits, use the official documentation rather than this summary.
